name: IRC_IS_INTERVIEW_PART
description: IRC_IS_INTERVIEW_PART will contain all the interview participants.

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key representing the participant for this table.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_INTERVIEW_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the schedule interview entry. (IRC_IS_INTERVIEWS)

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key for the person_id representing this participants. (PER_PERSONS)

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of participant that will take part of the interview. Lookup defined by ORA_IRC_IS_INTERVIEWS_PART_TYPE which can be INTERVIEWER or ORGANIZER.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup value associated with ORA_IRC_IS_PARTICIPANT_RESPONSE lookup type.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_PROPOSED_START_DATE
columns.Comments: The participant proposed a new start date.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_PROPOSED_END_DATE
columns.Comments: The participant proposed a new end date.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: The participant responded message that he entered manually.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: The submission id of the candidate that participates in an interview. Foreign key to the associated submission(IRC_SUBMISSIONS).

columns.Name: INTRVW_REQUESTS_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the interview request entry. (IRC_IS_INTRVW_REQUESTS)
